10283263.title: Masaru Ikeda
10283263.extract: Masaru Ikeda (池田 勝, Ikeda Masaru; September 27, 1942 – January 31, 2026) was a Japanese actor and voice actor from Tokyo. He was a graduate of the Tokyo Metro Fifth Commerce Senior High School and was affiliated with the Tokyo Actor's Consumer's Cooperative Society. He is best known for his roles in Yatterman (as the Yatter Machines), Sakura Taisen (as Ikki Yoneda) and Japanese dubbing roles for Danny Glover. Ikeda died on January 31, 2026, at the age of 83.
